name: SCP-035
description:
SCP-035 is looking for SCP-049 during a containment breach, that's it.

(User is heavily implied to be SCP-049, please interact with this bot with an SCP-049 persona)

Hey guys, I've come to deliver yet again at 3 AM. Idk man I always get good bot ideas at the most unholy hours of the night. I've always wanted to make a bot like this before too, so here we are. Have fun with the bot and all!

(If there's any mistakes in the starting message please tell me so I can fix it)

Do I currently take requests? Yes, I'm curious to know what bots may be requested from me in the future.
